all.en: The lunch bell rang, and hungry students rushed into the noisy cafeteria.
all.zh: 午餐鐘聲響起，飢餓的學生們衝進嘈雜的餐廳。

all.en: Anna grabbed a tray and joined the long line at the hot food counter.
all.zh: 安娜拿起餐盤，加入了熱食櫃台前的長隊伍。

all.en: She chose spaghetti with meatballs, a side salad, and a carton of apple juice.
all.zh: 她選了肉丸義大利麵、一份配菜沙拉，還有一盒蘋果汁。

all.en: Her best friend Olivia was already saving a seat for her at the corner table.
all.zh: 她最好的朋友奧莉維亞已經在角落的桌子幫她佔好位子了。

all.en: They started chatting about the new English teacher who had given them so much homework.
all.zh: 她們開始聊起那位給了她們很多作業的新英文老師。

all.en: Olivia complained that the essay assignment was due on Monday morning.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞抱怨那篇作文作業要在週一早上交。

all.en: Anna offered to read Olivia's draft after lunch and give her some advice.
all.zh: 安娜提議午餐後讀奧莉維亞的草稿，並給她一些建議。

all.en: They also discussed plans for the upcoming weekend, including a possible movie night.
all.zh: 她們還討論了即將到來的週末計畫，包括可能的電影之夜。

all.en: A boy named Lucas walked over and asked if he could borrow Anna's calculator.
all.zh: 一個叫盧卡斯的男孩走過來，問安娜能否借他計算機。

all.en: Anna handed it to him, reminding him to return it before fifth-period class.
all.zh: 安娜把計算機遞給他，提醒他在第五節課前歸還。

all.en: When the warning bell rang, they quickly cleared their trays and hurried back to class.
all.zh: 當預備鐘響起時，她們迅速清理餐盤，匆忙趕回教室。

all.en: During fifth period, Lucas quietly returned the calculator to Anna with a grateful smile.
all.zh: 第五節課時，盧卡斯安靜地把計算機還給安娜，臉上帶著感激的微笑。

all.en: He also handed her a small chocolate bar as a thank-you gift for the favor.
all.zh: 他還遞給她一條小巧克力棒，作為這次幫忙的謝禮。

all.en: After classes ended, Anna walked with Olivia to the library to review the English draft.
all.zh: 放學後，安娜和奧莉維亞一起走到圖書館檢視英文作文草稿。

all.en: Olivia's essay was about her grandmother's amazing journey from a tiny mountain village.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞的作文是關於她奶奶從一個小山村出發的驚人旅程。

all.en: Anna found the story moving but suggested adding more specific details and dialogue.
all.zh: 安娜覺得這個故事很感人，但建議加入更多具體的細節和對話。

all.en: Olivia took careful notes and promised to revise the essay before Sunday evening.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞仔細地做筆記，並答應在星期天晚上之前修改作文。

all.en: They confirmed Saturday's movie plan and decided to invite Lucas and two other friends.
all.zh: 她們確認了星期六的電影計畫，並決定邀請盧卡斯和另外兩位朋友。

all.en: Anna mentioned a new pizza place near the cinema that offered student discounts.
all.zh: 安娜提到電影院附近有一家新的披薩店提供學生折扣。

all.en: Olivia happily agreed, saying her father had recommended that exact restaurant last week.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞開心地答應，說她爸爸上週才推薦過那家餐廳。

all.en: They left the library laughing, looking forward to a fun and relaxing weekend together.
all.zh: 她們笑著離開圖書館，期待著一個有趣又放鬆的週末。

all.en: Saturday evening arrived quickly, and the group met excitedly outside the bright cinema entrance.
all.zh: 星期六傍晚很快來臨，這群人興奮地在明亮的電影院入口外集合。

all.en: Lucas brought a small bag of homemade popcorn to share with everyone before the movie.
all.zh: 盧卡斯帶來一小袋自製爆米花，要在電影開演前和大家分享。

all.en: They watched a hilarious comedy that made the entire theater burst into loud laughter.
all.zh: 他們看了一部爆笑喜劇，讓整個戲院都爆出陣陣大笑。

all.en: Anna laughed so hard during one scene that tears rolled down her cheeks uncontrollably.
all.zh: 安娜在某一幕笑得太厲害，眼淚不受控地滑下臉頰。

all.en: After the film, they walked to the new pizza place and ordered a large pepperoni pie.
all.zh: 電影結束後，他們走到新的披薩店，點了一個大份的辣腸披薩。

all.en: The owner welcomed them warmly and gave each student a free dessert as a special bonus.
all.zh: 老闆熱情地歡迎他們，並送給每位學生一份免費甜點作為特別招待。

all.en: They discussed the funniest scenes from the movie and quoted lines until their stomachs ached.
all.zh: 他們討論著電影裡最搞笑的場景，並學著台詞直到肚子都笑痛了。

all.en: Olivia thanked Anna again for her helpful advice on the English essay assignment.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞再次感謝安娜對英文作文作業所提供的有用建議。

all.en: Lucas suggested that they organize a similar movie night every month throughout the school year.
all.zh: 盧卡斯建議他們在這學年每個月都舉辦類似的電影之夜。

all.en: Everyone agreed enthusiastically and headed home with happy hearts and brand new memories.
all.zh: 大家都熱情地同意，帶著快樂的心情和嶄新的回憶踏上歸途。

all.en: The following Monday, the friends gathered at the cafeteria to plan next month's exciting movie night.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一，朋友們聚在餐廳規劃下個月精彩的電影之夜。

all.en: Anna suggested watching a classic mystery film and discussing the plot afterward over warm desserts.
all.zh: 安娜建議看一部經典懸疑片，之後配著溫暖的甜點討論劇情。

all.en: Olivia proudly announced that her revised English essay had received the highest grade in class.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞自豪地宣布，她修改後的英文作文獲得全班最高分。

all.en: The teacher had read it aloud as an excellent example of detailed storytelling and clear style.
all.zh: 老師把它當作詳細敘事和清晰風格的優良範例朗讀給大家聽。

all.en: Lucas proposed starting a small student club focused on movies, books, and creative writing projects.
all.zh: 盧卡斯提議成立一個小型學生社團，專注於電影、書籍和創意寫作專題。

all.en: Everyone agreed enthusiastically and recruited several other curious classmates during the same afternoon.
all.zh: 大家熱烈贊同，並在同一個下午招募了幾位其他充滿好奇心的同學。

all.en: They held their first official meeting in the library and chose a friendly faculty advisor.
all.zh: 他們在圖書館舉行了第一次正式會議，並選出了一位友善的指導老師。

all.en: Anna volunteered to design colorful posters announcing each upcoming meeting and weekend event.
all.zh: 安娜自願設計色彩繽紛的海報，宣傳每一場即將到來的聚會和週末活動。

all.en: Olivia organized a small charity event where club members donated used books to local children.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞籌辦了一個小型慈善活動，社員們捐贈二手書籍給當地的孩童。

all.en: By the semester's end, their tiny lunch table had grown into a warm and welcoming community.
all.zh: 到了學期結束時，他們小小的午餐桌已成長為一個溫暖且歡迎所有人的社群。

all.en: In the spring, the club organized a school-wide book and movie festival lasting an entire weekend.
all.zh: 春天時，社團籌辦了一場為期整個週末的全校書籍與電影節。

all.en: Anna designed colorful banners and decorations that hung from every corner of the main hallway.
all.zh: 安娜設計了色彩繽紛的橫幅與裝飾，掛滿了主走廊的每個角落。

all.en: Olivia invited a famous local author to give a heartfelt speech about creative storytelling.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞邀請了一位著名的當地作家發表一場關於創意說故事的真摯演講。

all.en: Lucas operated the projector during three exciting film screenings held in the school auditorium.
all.zh: 盧卡斯在學校禮堂三場精彩的電影放映期間負責操作投影機。

all.en: The cafeteria offered themed snacks like popcorn, mini pizzas, and colorful storybook-shaped cookies.
all.zh: 餐廳提供了主題小點心，例如爆米花、迷你披薩和色彩繽紛的故事書造型餅乾。

all.en: Students from every grade level participated, and the festival attracted hundreds of curious visitors.
all.zh: 來自各年級的學生都參與了，這場節慶吸引了數百位好奇的訪客。

all.en: Anna led a creative writing workshop where younger students drafted their own short adventure stories.
all.zh: 安娜帶領了一個創意寫作工作坊，低年級學生在那裡撰寫自己的短篇冒險故事。

all.en: Olivia hosted a book swap corner that encouraged everyone to take home one new title for free.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞主持了一個換書角落，鼓勵大家免費帶回一本新書。

all.en: The principal praised their organization and announced the festival would become an annual school tradition.
all.zh: 校長讚揚他們的組織能力，並宣布這個節慶將成為學校的年度傳統。

all.en: Anna and Olivia hugged tightly, knowing that one shared lunch table had truly changed everything.
all.zh: 安娜和奧莉維亞緊緊擁抱，明白一張共享的午餐桌真的改變了一切。

all.en: The school festival became the highlight of every academic year, attended by hundreds of excited families.
all.zh: 校園節慶成為每個學年的重頭戲，每年都有數百個興奮的家庭前來參加。

all.en: Anna expanded her writing workshop to include collaborative storytelling, where every child contributed one sentence.
all.zh: 安娜把寫作工作坊擴展為協作故事，每個孩子都能貢獻一句話。

all.en: Olivia added a translation corner, where bilingual students helped others write notes in different languages.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞增設了翻譯角落，讓雙語學生幫助其他人用不同語言寫卡片。

all.en: The principal allowed them to publish a small festival magazine each year, edited entirely by students.
all.zh: 校長同意他們每年出版一本小型節慶雜誌，完全由學生編輯製作。

all.en: Anna wrote the editorial introduction, reminding readers that great communities began at simple lunch tables.
all.zh: 安娜撰寫了開頭的社論，提醒讀者偉大的社群往往從簡單的午餐桌開始。

all.en: Olivia interviewed every participating teacher and turned their stories into a beloved magazine section.
all.zh: 奧莉維亞訪問了每位參與的老師，把他們的故事彙集成大家最喜愛的專欄。

all.en: Local bookstores requested a few copies, and the magazine soon reached younger schools across the district.
all.zh: 當地書店也來索取數本，雜誌很快流傳到整個學區的低年級學校。

all.en: A famous children's author noticed the magazine and offered to write the foreword for next year's edition.
all.zh: 一位知名的兒童作家注意到這本雜誌，主動提出為明年的版本撰寫序文。

all.en: Anna and Olivia traveled to her bookstore signing, returning home with autographs and tearful joyful memories.
all.zh: 安娜和奧莉維亞特地去她的書店簽名會，帶著簽名和淚水般歡喜的回憶回家。

all.en: On the long bus ride home, Anna whispered that one shared meal had quietly carried them across an entire city.
all.zh: 在長途公車上，安娜輕聲說，一頓共享的午餐已經悄悄載著她們跨越了整座城市。
